arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Marcus Rashford has 'one option' for January loan exit which could help Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United outcast Marcus Rashford reportedly opens the door to joining Juventus if his dream transfer to Barcelona falls through.

arts.ttl: ‘Go and buy’: Paul Merson tells Arsenal to get £44m player signed right now
arts.sum: Arsenal have received so many transfer recommendations from pundits during this January transfer window. Ian Wright told Arsenal to sign Omar Marmoush, Darren Bent suggested...

arts.ttl: Arsenal's matches vs Man Utd and Chelsea both live on Sky in March
arts.sum: Arsenal's matches against Manchester United and Chelsea are among the seven Premier League matches to be shown live on Sky Sports in March.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal battle Real Madrid for Valencia’s Yarek Gasiorowski
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal battle Real Madrid for Valencia’s Yarek Gasiorowski Arsenal and Real Madrid are both keeping close tabs on Valencia’s highly rated centre-back Yarek Gasiorowski, with the Spain U19 international attracting widespread attention across Europe.

arts.ttl: 'Serious talks': Sky Sports journalist says Atletico Madrid now want to sign £30m Arsenal star in shock move
Fabrizio Romano: Wolves Eyeing Move to Sign ‘Extraordinary’ Midfielder
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are reportedly interested in Real Betis midfielder Johnny Cardoso after missing out on Manu Garcia.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Wolves - Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal's predicted starting XI against Wolves in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners star 'close' to leaving club ahead of emotional reunion
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Kieran Tierney is reportedly on the verge of agreeing a pre-contract deal with former club Celtic ahead of the summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal line up Mikel Arteta must pick vs Wolves as Jakub Kiwior starts
arts.sum: Truelove's XI: Raya, Timber, Kiwior, Gabriel, Zinchenko; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Martinelli, Havertz, Trossard Wilmot's team: Raya; Partey, Timber, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Rice, Merino, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Haverzt, Martinelli.

arts.ttl: Vitor Pereira reveals Matheus Cunha Wolves exit conversations amid Arsenal transfer links
arts.sum: Cunha has yet to sign a new deal with Wolves, but Pereira says he has had talks with the Brazilian about his behaviour and understands the forward has no plans to leave the club. He wants to help the team, be with us, to be with us tomorrow to try and win the game.
